summary: Nighttime street footage, watermarked 'FNTV,' of officers in tactical vests detaining a man on the ground outdoors during a crowded street scene. Officers in body armor restrain the man while bystanders crowd around; debris is on the pavement. The tweet text describes ICE agents removing a man from a New York City hospital while protesters gathered outside. The audio is crowd noise and shouting.

script.scene: Officers in tactical vests restrain a man on the ground at night while a crowd presses in; watermark 'FNTV.'
